name: Oath of Devotion
description: Paladins of Devotion uphold justice, virtue, and unwavering honor.

3.name: Oath Spells
3.description: You always have oath spells prepared at listed paladin levels.

3.name: Channel Divinity: Sacred Weapon
3.description: Imbue a weapon with holy power, adding Charisma modifier to attack rolls for 1 minute.

3.name: Channel Divinity: Turn the Unholy
3.description: As an action, turn fiends and undead near you.

7.name: Aura of Devotion
7.description: You and nearby allies cannot be charmed while you are conscious.

15.name: Purity of Spirit
15.description: You are always under the effects of protection from evil and good.

20.name: Holy Nimbus
20.description: Radiate sunlight for 1 minute, damaging enemies and granting advantage on saves against fiend/undead spells.
